title: DirectoryList sequence stamp races with concurrent disconnect
description: ws.rs directory build: online[] is partitioned from all_users, then each entry's sequence is stamped by calling state.connection_seq(). Between the partition step and the stamp step, a user can disconnect. connection_seq() returns u64::MAX for a disconnected user, which sorts them last (appearing to be the most-recent admin) instead of removing them. The stamped DirectoryList sent to the newly connected client may include a 'zombie' online user with sequence=u64::MAX, causing incorrect admin election on the receiving client until the UserLeft notification arrives.
